message.content:
Explore the Belt project to understand its current state. Focus on:

1. Project structure - list all packages in packages/ directory
2. Read pnpm-workspace.yaml and root package.json
3. Run: git log --oneline -15 to see recent changes
4. Check if there's a PROGRESS.md file in the root

Report what packages exist and which ones are supposedly active vs removed.

content.text: I'll explore the Belt project structure systematically to understand its current state.

input.description: Show recent git commits in the Belt project

file.content:
{
  "name": "belt",
  "version": "0.1.2",
  "private": true,
  "description": "TypeScript utility library with runtime type validation, state management, and common helpers",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt"
  },
  "author": "@antoniopresto <antoniopresto@gmail.com>",
  "packageManager": "bun@1.3.5",
  "workspaces": [
    "packages/*"
  ],
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "turbo run build",
    "test": "turbo run test",
    "check": "turbo run check",
    "format": "prettier ./prettier.config.mjs",
    "publish": "run-s publish:*",
    "publish:patch": "bun run version:patch",
    "publish:push": "git push origin main --tags",
    "version:patch": "./scripts/bump-version.sh patch",
    "version:minor": "./scripts/bump-version.sh minor",
    "version:major": "./scripts/bump-version.sh major"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@belt/prettier-plugin": "latest",
    "@types/node": "^25.0.3",
    "npm-run-all": "^4.1.5",
    "prettier": "^3.7.4",
    "prettier-plugin-organize-imports": "^4.3.0",
    "turbo": "^2.7.2",
    "typescript": "^5.9.3"
  }
}

file.content:
{
  "name": "@belt/tools",
  "description": "TypeScript utility library with runtime type validation, state management, and common helpers",
  "type": "module",
  "sideEffects": false,
  "version": "0.1.2",
  "author": "Antonio Presto <antoniopresto@gmail.com>",
  "license": "MIT",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt",
    "directory": "packages/tools"
  },
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/issues"
  },
  "homepage": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/tree/main/packages/tools#readme",
  "keywords": [
    "typescript",
    "validation",
    "state-management",
    "schema",
    "runtime-types",
    "helpers",
    "utilities"
  ],
  "main": "./dist/index.cjs",
  "module": "./dist/index.mjs",
  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
  "exports": {
    ".": {
      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/index.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/index.cjs"
    },
    "./schema": {
      "types": "./dist/schema.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/schema.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/schema.cjs"
    },
    "./state-machine": {
      "types": "./dist/state-machine.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/state-machine.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/state-machine.cjs"
    }
  },
  "files": [
    "dist"
  ],
  "scripts": {
    "build": "vite build",
    "dev": "vite build --watch",
    "test": "vitest run --passWithNoTests",
    "test:watch": "vitest --watch --passWithNoTests",
    "coverage": "vitest --coverage",
    "check": "run-s check:*",
    "check:types": "tsc --noEmit",
    "check:lint": "eslint src --fix",
    "check:format": "prettier --write ."
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "date-fns": "^4.1.0",
    "immer": "^11.1.3",
    "lodash": "^4.17.21",
    "lru-cache": "^11.2.4",
    "minimatch": "^10.1.1",
    "typebox": "^1.0.73"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@belt/prettier-plugin": "workspace:*",
    "@eslint/js": "^9.39.2",
    "@types/lodash": "^4.17.21",
    "@types/node": "^25.0.3",
    "@types/react": "^19.2.7",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react-swc": "^4.2.2",
    "eslint": "^9.39.2",
    "npm-run-all": "^4.1.5",
    "prettier": "^3.7.4",
    "prettier-plugin-organize-imports": "^4.3.0",
    "rollup-plugin-node-externals": "^8.1.2",
    "terser": "^5.44.1",
    "typescript": "^5.9.3",
    "typescript-eslint": "^8.52.0",
    "vite": "^7.3.0",
    "vite-plugin-dts": "^4.5.4",
    "vite-plugin-externalize-deps": "^0.10.0",
    "vite-tsconfig-paths": "^6.0.3",
    "vitest": "^4.0.16"
  }
}

file.content:
{
  "name": "@belt/cli",
  "description": "Belt CLI - Project scaffolding and AI harness for Claude Code",
  "type": "module",
  "sideEffects": false,
  "version": "0.1.2",
  "author": "Antonio Presto <antoniopresto@gmail.com>",
  "license": "MIT",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt",
    "directory": "packages/cli"
  },
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/issues"
  },
  "homepage": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/tree/main/packages/cli#readme",
  "keywords": [
    "cli",
    "scaffolding",
    "claude-code",
    "harness",
    "brainstorm",
    "monorepo"
  ],
  "main": "./dist/index.cjs",
  "module": "./dist/index.mjs",
  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
  "bin": {
    "belt": "./dist/cli.mjs"
  },
  "exports": {
    "./cli": {
      "types": "./dist/cli.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/cli.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/cli.cjs"
    },
    "./commands": {
      "types": "./dist/commands.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/commands.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/commands.cjs"
    },
    "./harness": {
      "types": "./dist/harness.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/harness.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/harness.cjs"
    },
    ".": {
      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/index.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/index.cjs"
    },
    "./templates": {
      "types": "./dist/templates.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/templates.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/templates.cjs"
    },
    "./utils": {
      "types": "./dist/utils.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/utils.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/utils.cjs"
    }
  },
  "files": [
    "dist"
  ],
  "scripts": {
    "build": "vite build",
    "dev": "vite build --watch",
    "test": "vitest run --exclude '**/*.integration.test.ts' --exclude '**/*.e2e.test.ts' --passWithNoTests",
    "test:watch": "vitest --watch --exclude '**/*.integration.test.ts' --exclude '**/*.e2e.test.ts'",
    "test:integration": "vitest run --reporter=verbose src/__tests__/e2e",
    "test:all": "vitest run",
    "coverage": "vitest --coverage",
    "check": "run-s check:*",
    "check:types": "tsc --noEmit",
    "check:lint": "eslint src --fix",
    "check:format": "prettier --write ."
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@belt/ai": "workspace:*",
    "@belt/tools": "workspace:*",
    "p-limit": "^7.2.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@belt/prettier-plugin": "workspace:*",
    "@eslint/js": "^9.39.2",
    "@types/node": "^25.0.3",
    "eslint": "^9.39.2",
    "npm-run-all": "^4.1.5",
    "prettier": "^3.7.4",
    "prettier-plugin-organize-imports": "^4.3.0",
    "rollup-plugin-node-externals": "^8.1.2",
    "terser": "^5.44.1",
    "typescript": "^5.9.3",
    "typescript-eslint": "^8.52.0",
    "vite": "^7.3.0",
    "vite-plugin-dts": "^4.5.4",
    "vite-plugin-externalize-deps": "^0.10.0",
    "vite-tsconfig-paths": "^6.0.3",
    "vitest": "^4.0.16"
  }
}

1→{
     2→  "name": "@belt/ai",
     3→  "description": "Belt utilities to work with AI - AgentRC cascade rules for Claude Code",
     4→  "type": "module",
     5→  "sideEffects": false,
     6→  "version": "0.1.2",
     7→  "author": "Antonio Presto <antoniopresto@gmail.com>",
     8→  "license": "MIT",
     9→  "repository": {
    10→    "type": "git",
    11→    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt",
    12→    "directory": "packages/ai-tools"
    13→  },
    14→  "bugs": {
    15→    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/issues"
    16→  },
    17→  "homepage": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/tree/main/packages/ai-tools#readme",
    18→  "keywords": [
    19→    "claude-code",
    20→    "agentrc",
    21→    "rules",
    22→    "cascade",
    23→    "hooks",
    24→    "ai-tools"
    25→  ],
    26→  "main": "./dist/index.cjs",
    27→  "module": "./dist/index.mjs",
    28→  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
    29→  "bin": {
    30→    "belt-ai": "./dist/setup.mjs",
    31→    "belt-ai-setup": "./dist/setup.mjs",
    32→    "belt-ai-hook": "./dist/hook-runner.mjs"
    33→  },
    34→  "exports": {
    35→    "./define": {
    36→      "types": "./dist/define.d.ts",
    37→      "import": "./dist/define.mjs",
    38→      "require": "./dist/define.cjs"
    39→    },
    40→    "./hook-runner": {
    41→      "types": "./dist/hook-runner.d.ts",
    42→      "import": "./dist/hook-runner.mjs",
    43→      "require": "./dist/hook-runner.cjs"
    44→    },
    45→    "./hooks": {
    46→      "types": "./dist/hooks.d.ts",
    47→      "import": "./dist/hooks.mjs",
    48→      "require": "./dist/hooks.cjs"
    49→    },
    50→    ".": {
    51→      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
    52→      "import": "./dist/index.mjs",
    53→      "require": "./dist/index.cjs"
    54→    },
    55→    "./setup": {
    56→      "types": "./dist/setup.d.ts",
    57→      "import": "./dist/setup.mjs",
    58→      "require": "./dist/setup.cjs"
    59→    },
    60→    "./types": {
    61→      "types": "./dist/types.d.ts",
    62→      "import": "./dist/types.mjs",

file.content:
{
  "name": "@belt/ai",
  "description": "Belt utilities to work with AI - AgentRC cascade rules for Claude Code",
  "type": "module",
  "sideEffects": false,
  "version": "0.1.2",
  "author": "Antonio Presto <antoniopresto@gmail.com>",
  "license": "MIT",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt",
    "directory": "packages/ai-tools"
  },
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/issues"
  },
  "homepage": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/tree/main/packages/ai-tools#readme",
  "keywords": [
    "claude-code",
    "agentrc",
    "rules",
    "cascade",
    "hooks",
    "ai-tools"
  ],
  "main": "./dist/index.cjs",
  "module": "./dist/index.mjs",
  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
  "bin": {
    "belt-ai": "./dist/setup.mjs",
    "belt-ai-setup": "./dist/setup.mjs",
    "belt-ai-hook": "./dist/hook-runner.mjs"
  },
  "exports": {
    "./define": {
      "types": "./dist/define.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/define.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/define.cjs"
    },
    "./hook-runner": {
      "types": "./dist/hook-runner.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/hook-runner.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/hook-runner.cjs"
    },
    "./hooks": {
      "types": "./dist/hooks.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/hooks.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/hooks.cjs"
    },
    ".": {
      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/index.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/index.cjs"
    },
    "./setup": {
      "types": "./dist/setup.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/setup.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/setup.cjs"
    },
    "./types": {
      "types": "./dist/types.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/types.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/types.cjs"
    }
  },
  "files": [
    "dist"
  ],
  "scripts": {
    "build": "vite build",
    "dev": "vite build --watch",
    "test": "vitest run --exclude '**/*.integration.test.ts' --exclude '**/*.e2e.test.ts' --passWithNoTests",
    "test:watch": "vitest --watch --exclude '**/*.integration.test.ts' --exclude '**/*.e2e.test.ts'",
    "test:integration": "vitest run --reporter=verbose src/__tests__/integration",
    "test:all": "vitest run",
    "coverage": "vitest --coverage",
    "check": "run-s check:*",
    "check:types": "tsc --noEmit",
    "check:lint": "eslint src --fix",
    "check:format": "prettier --write ."
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@belt/tools": "workspace:*"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@belt/prettier-plugin": "workspace:*",
    "@eslint/js": "^9.39.2",
    "@types/bun": "^1.3.5",
    "@types/lodash": "^4.17.21",
    "@types/node": "^25.0.3",
    "@types/react": "^19.2.7",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react-swc": "^4.2.2",
    "eslint": "^9.39.2",
    "npm-run-all": "^4.1.5",
    "prettier": "^3.7.4",
    "prettier-plugin-organize-imports": "^4.3.0",
    "rollup-plugin-node-externals": "^8.1.2",
    "terser": "^5.44.1",
    "typescript": "^5.9.3",
    "typescript-eslint": "^8.52.0",
    "vite": "^7.3.0",
    "vite-plugin-dts": "^4.5.4",
    "vite-plugin-externalize-deps": "^0.10.0",
    "vite-tsconfig-paths": "^6.0.3",
    "vitest": "^4.0.16"
  }
}

{
  "name": "@belt/prettier-plugin",
  "version": "0.1.2",
  "description": "Prettier plugin for standardizing line breaks and multi-line formatting",
  "type": "module",
  "sideEffects": false,
  "author": "Antonio Presto <antoniopresto@gmail.com>",
  "license": "MIT",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt",
    "directory": "packages/prettier-plugin"
  },
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/issues"
  },
  "homepage": "https://github.com/antoniopresto/belt/tree/main/packages/prettier-plugin#readme",
  "main": "./dist/index.cjs",
  "module": "./dist/index.mjs",
  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
  "exports": {
    ".": {
      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
      "import": "./dist/index.mjs",
      "require": "./dist/index.cjs"
    }
  },
  "files": [
    "dist"
  ],
  "scripts": {
    "build": "vite build",
    "dev": "vite build --watch",
    "test": "vitest run --passWithNoTests",
    "test:watch": "vitest --watch --passWithNoTests",
    "coverage": "vitest --coverage",
    "check": "run-s check:*",
    "check:types": "tsc --noEmit",
    "check:lint": "eslint src --fix",
    "check:format": "prettier --write ."
  },
  "keywords": [
    "prettier",
    "prettier-plugin",
    "formatting",
    "line-breaks",
    "multiline"
  ],
  "peerDependencies": {
    "prettier": "^3.0.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@eslint/js": "^9.39.2",
    "@types/node": "^25.0.3",
    "eslint": "^9.39.2",
    "prettier": "^3.7.4",
    "prettier-plugin-organize-imports": "^4.3.0",
    "rollup-plugin-node-externals": "^8.1.2",
    "terser": "^5.44.1",
    "typescript": "^5.8.3",
    "typescript-eslint": "^8.52.0",
    "vite": "^7.3.0",
    "vite-plugin-dts": "^4.5.4",
    "vite-plugin-externalize-deps": "^0.10.0",
    "vite-tsconfig-paths": "^6.0.3",
    "vitest": "^4.0.16",
    "npm-run-all": "^4.1.5"
  }
}

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Let me compile a comprehensive report:

## Belt Project State Report

### Project Overview
- **Monorepo Type**: Bun + Turborepo
- **Version**: 0.1.2 (current release)
- **Last Major Commit**: `f2f1f67` - "add compliance" (most recent)
- **Node Requirement**: >=20.0.0
- **Package Manager**: Bun 1.3.5

### Packages Structure

All 6 packages exist in `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/belt/packages/`:

| Package | Name | Type | Status | Key Dependencies |
|---------|------|------|--------|------------------|
| **tools** | @belt/tools | Core Library | Active | date-fns, immer, lodash, lru-cache, minimatch, typebox |
| **ai-tools** | @belt/ai | AI Integration | Active | @belt/tools |
| **cli** | @belt/cli | CLI Tool | Active | @belt/ai, @belt/tools, p-limit |
| **belt-setup** | belt-setup | Setup Utility | Active | @belt/ai, @belt/cli |
| **prettier-plugin** | @belt/prettier-plugin | Prettier Plugin | Active | prettier (peerDep) |
| **compliance** | @belt/compliance | Activity Monitor | Active | @jitsi/robotjs, commander |

### Active vs Removed Packages

**All packages are currently ACTIVE** - no packages have been marked as removed or deprecated.

However, git history reveals an important context:
- Commit `21a5966`: "refactor: simplify project to @belt/tools only" - This suggests at some point the project was simplified to focus on @belt/tools as the core
- Currently, however, ALL packages remain in the monorepo and are actively maintained (all at v0.1.2)

### Package Purposes

1. **@belt/tools** - Core TypeScript utility library with:
   - Schema validation (TypeBox)
   - State machine (Immer-based)
   - Common helpers (date, string, object)
   - Type utilities
   - Multiple named exports (schema, state-machine)

2. **@belt/ai** - Claude Code integration layer:
   - AgentRC cascade rules
   - Hook runner system
   - Setup utilities
   - Hooks and type definitions

3. **@belt/cli** - Project scaffolding and harness:
   - CLI commands
   - Templates
   - Utils
   - Depends on @belt/ai and @belt/tools

4. **belt-setup** - Setup harness wrapper:
   - CLI entry point for setup
   - Depends on @belt/ai and @belt/cli

5. **@belt/prettier-plugin** - Formatting utility:
   - Line break standardization
   - Multi-line formatting
   - No internal dependencies (peerDep on prettier)

6. **@belt/compliance** - Activity monitoring:
   - Mouse/activity jiggler
   - Teams presence management
   - CLI-based daemon
   - Uses robotjs for input simulation

### Build & Configuration

- **Build System**: Turborepo with task dependencies
- **Config Files**: 
  - `turbo.json` defines task graph
  - `package.json` uses Bun workspaces
  - No `pnpm-workspace.yaml` found (uses Bun instead)
- **Build Tasks**: build, dev, lint, typecheck, check, test, clean

### Recent Activity
Most recent 15 commits span dependency updates, publishing, and the addition of compliance monitoring tool. No deprecations or removals in recent history.
